channel.title: Kicksecure 17 in dom0: No internet connection
channel.description:
Hello,
I am (still) using Qubes 4.2.4 and I converted the debian-12 template into a kicksecure-17 template using “distribution morphing,” assigning sys-net to the template. The internet connection and everything else is working perfectly.
Now I wanted to test the other method and installed kicksecure-17 via dom0 as well, assigning sys-net to this template. This time, the internet connection does not work. The sdwdate icon appears, but the network manager icon does not, and no connection is being established.
When I reassign sys-net to the “morphed” kicksecure template. It works again.
What is the reason for that?
I actually wanted to install Qubes 4.3 and kicksecure-18, but first I want to test on the 4.2.4 system with kicksecure-17 to see if I’m doing something wrong or, if not, to find out where the error is.
Thank you very much for the answers!

item.title: Kicksecure 17 in dom0: No internet connection
item.dc:creator: Ionixx
item.description:
Oh okay, then it will be the best to install kicksecure-18 immediately. I´ll try to install it in dom0 and we´ll see what happens.

Read full topic
item.source: Kicksecure 17 in dom0: No internet connection

item.title: Kicksecure 17 in dom0: No internet connection
item.dc:creator: arraybolt3
item.description:
You probably need to install the network-manager-gnome widget and network firmware packages. Compare the list of installed packages from debian-12-xfce to the list of installed packages in kicksecure-17 to identify which packages you likely need.

Read full topic
item.source: Kicksecure 17 in dom0: No internet connection

item.title: Kicksecure 17 in dom0: No internet connection
item.dc:creator: Patrick
item.description:
No developer time will be spent on version 17 usability / functionality debugging.

Read full topic
item.source: Kicksecure 17 in dom0: No internet connection

item.title: Kicksecure 17 in dom0: No internet connection
item.dc:creator: Ionixx
item.description:
Hello,

I am (still) using Qubes 4.2.4 and I converted the debian-12 template into a kicksecure-17 template using “distribution morphing,” assigning sys-net to the template. The internet connection and everything else is working perfectly.

Now I wanted to test the other method and installed kicksecure-17 via dom0 as well, assigning sys-net to this template. This time, the internet connection does not work. The sdwdate icon appears, but the network manager icon does not, and no connection is being established.

When I reassign sys-net to the “morphed” kicksecure template. It works again.

What is the reason for that?

I actually wanted to install Qubes 4.3 and kicksecure-18, but first I want to test on the 4.2.4 system with kicksecure-17 to see if I’m doing something wrong or, if not, to find out where the error is.

Thank you very much for the answers!

Read full topic
item.source: Kicksecure 17 in dom0: No internet connection
